seoTitle: North Epping vs North Haven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Epping and North Haven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Epping vs North Haven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Epping and North Haven.
heading: North Epping vs North Haven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Epping, New South Wales and North Haven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Haven has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to North Epping (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Epping or North Haven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Epping has a flood risk score of 44/100, while North Haven scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Epping scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. North Haven scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Epping or North Haven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Haven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
